enriched_points.expanded_content: AEM technology facilitates efficient water electrolysis using alkaline conditions, promoting green hydrogen production with improved ion transport and reduced costs compared to traditional methods.

Recent advancements in electrolyzer design include optimized catalyst layers and innovative membrane configurations, enhancing performance and durability while minimizing energy consumption in hydrogen production.
Ongoing research aims to enhance AEM electrolyzer efficiency and scalability, focusing on integrating renewable energy sources and developing cost-effective materials for widespread application.
